channel.title: edamame — Kintone Philippines Field Notes
channel.description: No-code, AI-merged operations, and Kintone implementation field notes from the Philippines. Official Kintone Partner. 2024 Cybozu Global Partner of the Year.
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Edamame Inc. All rights reserved.
